summary: Created 6-phase implementation plan for stripping non-bimodal code. Phases: (1) fix 13 hard coupling points in source files, (2) remove bimodal iterate dependency, (3) delete 4 module directories, (4) clean residual source references in 11 files, (5) clean test files, (6) clean pyproject.toml dependencies.
